recipes.title: Oat kefir porridge with Greek yogurt, berries and walnuts
instructions: Bring soy milk to a gentle simmer in a medium saucepan; stir in oats and cook 4–5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until creamy.
Remove from heat and let cool 2 minutes; divide into bowls sized to each person's portion — largest for husband.
Spoon Greek yogurt over each bowl, then pile on berries and chopped walnuts.
Sprinkle ground flaxseed over each bowl and serve with a glass of kefir.

recipes.title: Cottage cheese rye plates with vegetables, walnuts and kefir
instructions: Slice cucumber and halve cherry tomatoes; arrange on plates.
Place rye bread slices alongside and spoon cottage cheese generously over or next to the bread — larger portions for husband and child.
Scatter roughly chopped walnuts and ground flaxseed over the cottage cheese.
Pour kefir into glasses and serve.

recipes.title: Buckwheat Greek yogurt bowls with berries, walnuts and flaxseed
instructions: Rinse buckwheat under cold water; place in a saucepan with 600 ml cold water, bring to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and cook 12–15 minutes until tender and water is absorbed.
Remove from heat, fluff with a fork, and let stand covered for 2 minutes.
Divide buckwheat among bowls sized to each person's portion; spoon Greek yogurt over the warm grain.
Top with berries and chopped walnuts, sprinkle flaxseed, and serve with a glass of kefir.

recipes.title: Egg-white scramble with rye toast, avocado and kefir
instructions: Toast rye bread until crisp.
Whisk whole eggs with egg whites in a bowl; season with a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat; pour in the egg mixture and scramble gently for 3–4 minutes until just set, removing from heat while still slightly soft.
Mash or slice avocado onto the toast; lay sliced tomatoes alongside.
Divide scrambled eggs over the plates — larger portions for husband — and serve with a glass of kefir.

recipes.title: Barley flake soy yogurt bowls with banana, walnuts and chia
instructions: Bring soy milk to a gentle simmer; stir in barley flakes and cook 4–5 minutes, stirring, until thick and creamy.
Divide into bowls — largest for husband; let cool 2 minutes.
Spoon soy yogurt over each bowl; add an extra spoonful of Greek yogurt to husband's bowl for additional protein.
Top with sliced banana, chopped walnuts, and chia seeds; serve immediately.

recipes.title: Oat egg-white pancakes with Greek yogurt, kiwi and walnuts

ingredients.name: rolled oats
ingredients.prep: blended or crushed to coarse flour

instructions: Place oats in a zip-lock bag and crush with a rolling pin to a coarse flour, or blend briefly.
Whisk oat flour with whole eggs, egg whites, and kefir until a smooth, pourable batter forms; rest 5 minutes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat with a thin film of olive oil; pour small rounds (~8 cm) and cook 2–3 minutes until bubbles form on the surface, then flip and cook 1–2 minutes until golden.
Repeat with remaining batter, adding a tiny drop of oil between batches.
Serve pancakes topped with Greek yogurt, sliced kiwi, and chopped walnuts, portioned to each person's target.

recipes.title: Cottage cheese citrus kefir bowls with walnuts and flaxseed
instructions: Peel and segment oranges, removing as much pith as possible.
Divide cottage cheese into bowls — largest for husband; pour kefir over each and stir lightly to loosen.
Arrange orange segments on top of each bowl; scatter chopped walnuts, ground flaxseed, and chia seeds over the top.
Serve soy milk in a glass alongside the child's bowl for extra calcium.

recipes.title: Chicken vegetable barley soup with rye bread
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat; sauté diced onion and carrots for 5 minutes until softened.
Add minced garlic, sliced celery, barley, bay leaves, and whole chicken breasts; cover with 2 litres of cold water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to a steady simmer, cover, and cook 30 minutes until barley is tender.
Remove chicken, shred into bite-sized pieces with two forks, and return to the pot.
Stir in spinach, cook 2 minutes until wilted; season with salt and pepper, discard bay leaves, and serve in deep bowls with rye bread.

recipes.title: Salmon potato broccoli tray bake with yogurt dill sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss potato and carrot chunks with 25 ml olive oil and a pinch of salt; spread on a large baking tray and roast 20 minutes.
Add broccoli florets to the tray, drizzle with remaining oil, toss, and return to oven for 10 minutes.
Nestle salmon portions on top of the vegetables, season lightly, and roast 12–15 minutes until salmon is just cooked through and flakes easily.
While salmon roasts, stir chopped dill and lemon juice into Greek yogurt to make the sauce; season with pepper.
Serve salmon over vegetables with yogurt dill sauce alongside; portion sizes — largest for husband.

recipes.title: Turkey lentil barley stew with tomatoes and vegetables
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot; sauté diced onions, carrots, and peppers over medium heat for 7 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and turkey mince; cook, breaking up clumps, for 5 minutes until browned.
Stir in lentils, barley, canned tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and 1.5 litres of water; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 35 minutes until lentils and barley are tender.
Stir in spinach, cook 3 minutes; season with salt and pepper and serve — portion sizes largest for husband.

recipes.title: Tofu chickpea spinach brown rice stir-fry
instructions: Cook brown rice in 1 litre of lightly salted water for 25–30 minutes until tender; drain any excess water and set aside.
Pat tofu cubes dry with kitchen paper; fry in 15 ml olive oil in a large non-stick pan over high heat for 5–7 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden on most sides; remove and set aside.
Add remaining oil to the pan; stir-fry broccoli and sliced peppers over high heat for 4 minutes, then add garlic and ginger for 1 minute.
Return tofu to the pan with drained chickpeas and cooked rice; pour over soy sauce and toss everything together for 3 minutes over high heat.
Stir in spinach until just wilted; taste, adjust seasoning, and serve in bowls portioned by target.

recipes.title: Chicken mushroom barley pot with peas and spinach
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over high heat; sear diced chicken for 5 minutes until golden; remove and set aside.
In the same pot, sauté diced onions over medium heat for 3 minutes; add sliced mushrooms and garlic and cook 5 minutes until mushrooms release their liquid.
Stir in barley, chicken, stock, and thyme; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 30 minutes until barley is tender and has absorbed most of the liquid.
Stir in peas and spinach; cook 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper and serve in portions — largest for husband.

recipes.title: Mackerel potato plates with cabbage slaw and yogurt herb sauce
instructions: Boil potatoes in lightly salted water for 20–25 minutes until tender; drain and keep warm.
Combine shredded cabbage and grated carrot in a bowl; mix with half the yogurt, lemon juice, mustard, a pinch of salt, and pepper to make the slaw.
Preheat oven to 200°C; place mackerel fillets skin-side down on a lined baking tray, drizzle with olive oil, season lightly, and bake 12–15 minutes until cooked through.
Stir chopped herbs into the remaining yogurt to make the herb sauce.
Serve mackerel with boiled potatoes and a generous portion of slaw; spoon herb sauce over the top.

recipes.title: Lentil cod vegetable soup with rye bread
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan; sauté diced onion, carrots, and celery for 5 minutes until soft.
Add garlic, lentils, canned tomatoes, bay leaf, paprika, and 1.5 litres of water; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes until lentils are completely soft; season with salt and pepper.
Add cod pieces and simmer gently 7 minutes until fish is cooked through and flakes into the soup.
Remove bay leaf; ladle into deep bowls and serve with a slice of rye bread per person.

recipes.title: Lean beef bean chili with brown rice and vegetables
instructions: Cook brown rice in 800 ml water for 25–30 minutes until tender; fluff and set aside.
Brown beef mince in olive oil in a large pot over high heat, breaking up lumps, for 5–6 minutes.
Add diced onions, carrots, and peppers; cook 5 minutes over medium heat until softened, then stir in garlic, cumin, paprika, and chili flakes for 1 minute.
Pour in canned tomatoes and 300 ml water; stir in drained beans; bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered 20 minutes until thickened.
Serve chili over rice with a spoonful of Greek yogurt; portion sizes largest for husband.

recipes.title: Sardine barley plates with roasted vegetables and yogurt lemon sauce

ingredients.name: canned sardines with bones (in olive oil)

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C; toss sliced peppers, carrot sticks, and halved tomatoes with olive oil and a pinch of salt; spread on a baking tray and roast 25 minutes until tender and slightly caramelised.
Cook barley in 3× its volume of lightly salted water for 25–30 minutes until tender; drain well.
Stir lemon juice and chopped herbs into Greek yogurt to make the sauce; season with pepper.
Divide barley among plates; arrange roasted vegetables alongside.
Open sardine cans, drain excess oil, and flake sardines over each plate; drizzle with yogurt lemon sauce and serve.

recipes.title: Greek yogurt berry chia cups with walnuts
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into cups or small bowls, sized to each person's portion — largest for husband.
Top with berries, chia seeds, and chopped walnuts.
Serve immediately or chill for up to 30 minutes.

recipes.title: Kefir crispbread plates with cottage cheese and vegetables
instructions: Spread cottage cheese onto crispbread slices.
Slice cucumber and halve cherry tomatoes; arrange alongside the crispbread.
Pour kefir into glasses and serve.

recipes.title: Hummus vegetable boiled egg and kefir plates
instructions: Place eggs in cold water, bring to a boil, and cook 10 minutes; transfer to cold water to cool, then peel and halve.
Arrange carrot sticks and pepper strips on plates.
Spread hummus onto crispbread and place alongside the vegetables and halved eggs.
Pour kefir into glasses and serve.

recipes.title: Greek yogurt kiwi walnut cups
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into cups sized to each person's portion.
Top with sliced kiwi, chopped walnuts, and chia seeds.
Serve immediately.

recipes.title: Fortified soy yogurt with berries and walnuts
instructions: Spoon soy yogurt into bowls sized to each person's portion.
Top with berries, chopped walnuts, and chia seeds.
Serve chilled.

recipes.title: Greek yogurt berry pumpkin seed cups
instructions: Spoon Greek yogurt into cups sized to each person's portion.
Top with berries, pumpkin seeds, and ground flaxseed.
Serve immediately or chill up to 30 minutes.

items.name: Fresh mackerel fillets
items.note: Prefer fresh over smoked to keep sodium lower
